title: No More Forever Projectiles
description: Configurable max distance for each projectile that just shoots straight forever. Affects Wither Skulls, Wind Charges, and Fireball variants.
body: # No More Forever Projeciles Configurable max distance for projectiles that just shoot straight forever. No more Wither Skulls stuck in the stratosphere! **Note:** This is a datapack, but is also packaged as a mod. ## Affected Entities - Wither Skulls - Wind Charges - Fireballs - Small Fireballs - Dragon Fireballs ## Configuration Can be configured and disabled for each projectile type by OPs in a dialog accessible by the Pause Menu, through the `Data Packs...` button. ##### When Deletion is enabled for a projectile, it will be deleted after traveling the distance specified in the Max Distance (+/- about 5 blocks). If you can't find the options screen in the pause menu, there might be something overriding it. You can alternatively access them by running the following command as an OP ```mcfunction /dialog show @s rc_forever_projectiles:about ```
